title: Migrate Outreach Samples from Notion
userStory: As Steve, I want past outreach messages in the graph so that recall_similar_outreach has real material to draw from.
acceptanceCriteria: migrate_outreach_samples reads the per-message Outreach Samples DB under Writing Samples
Each row produces an episode named 'Outreach: {persona} at {company} - {channel}'
Episode body contains the full message text + context (why sent, what hooked them, response if any)
entity_hints set to {company, person, persona, channel in [linkedin, email, twitter]}
Verify: search_nodes('outreach to AI startup founders') returns at least one expected message; channel filter behaves correctly
